task_updates.executor_notes: Exported `buildSummary` and extended `SelectedMediaClip` with optional `generationId`. Timeline clip selection still omits the field by default, and `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Added a distinct multi-generation drag MIME type, setter/getter helpers, and `getDragType()` detection that checks multi-generation payloads before single-generation payloads. Verified with the full drag/drop module test file and repository typecheck.
Extended `SelectedClipPayload` with optional `generation_id`, preserving existing clip payload consumers. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed after the type change.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: The new `generationId` field is optional, so timeline clip selections continue to produce the same shape unless a gallery-backed selection sets it later.
Multi-generation drags use a separate `application/x-generation-multi` MIME type and text prefix, and `getDragType()` checks that path first so single and multi drags remain distinguishable.
The new `generation_id` field is optional on `SelectedClipPayload`, so existing callers do not need to provide it and current type consumers continue to compile.
